content: I will add `project_name` and `milestone_name` properties to the `Timesheet` model in `timesheets/models.py`. This exposes them as readable attributes for Django REST Framework serializers.

args.Description: "Added project_name and milestone_name properties to Timesheet model for serializer lookup compatibility."
args.Instruction: "Add project_name and milestone_name properties to the Timesheet model."
